name: NEXUS Golf Club
address: 100 Church St Basement, New York, NY 10007
about: NEXUS Golf Club is a premium private indoor golf facility located in Downtown Manhattan. It is equipped with state-of-the-art hitting bays and Trackman iO technology, allowing golfers to improve their game year-round. Members enjoy complimentary bay usage and access to personalized training with in-house professionals. The facility also features a True Spec Golf location for club fittings and is led by instructor Collin Woods, offering a holistic coaching approach focused on biomechanics, technology, and wellness. Membership is required for bay usage, priced at $5,000 annually.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman iO technology for real-time performance data and score tracking
Complimentary annual club fitting with True Spec Golf
Flexible bay availability with nearly 24/7 access for members
Holistic coaching approach from a lead instructor with elite industry connections

simulator_hardware.notes: Combines radar, infrared, and high-speed imaging for real-time 3D spin and spin axis data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members can securely store their clubs at the facility (additional fee applies), but bringing your own clubs is recommended for personalized fitting and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink services, so it appears BYOB is not available. Contact the facility for more details.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time estimate for 18 holes, but with Trackman technology and flexible booking, golfers can play at their own pace.

faq.question: Is NEXUS Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility is a premium private indoor golf club focused on serious golf practice and coaching, not a family-oriented environment.
